title: Pulse Rivalry: Bulls vs Lakers
description: Defend the arena pulse by memorizing and replaying Bulls hoof-stomps and Lakers splash-chimes before the shot clock hits zero.

howToPlayJson.title: Pulse Rivalry: Bulls vs Lakers
howToPlayJson.objective: Repeat escalating red Bulls and gold Lakers beat patterns across a 2-minute rivalry run, chaining perfect possessions into a leaderboard score before you miss three plays.

controls.outcome: Inputs that Bulls pulse into the sequence
Inputs that Lakers pulse into the sequence

controls.input: Press and hold the lit pad until the ring closes
controls.outcome: Completes long notes that appear in later rounds

controls.input: Tap the flashing opposite-team pad when the whistle icon appears
controls.outcome: Steals the marked beat for bonus combo instead of copying it normally

steps: A short pattern is performed with punchy audio: Bulls beats sound like stomps and horn hits, Lakers beats sound like splashy synth chimes.
The player replays the pattern on two large mobile pads before the mini shot clock expires.
Every successful possession adds one new beat and slightly increases playback and replay speed.
Every few seconds a whistle marks one beat as a steal beat: that beat must be replayed on the opposite team pad, forcing the player to adapt
Perfect possessions raise a combo multiplier; stealing the whistle beat correctly gives an extra combo bump.
A mistake, missed hold, or expired shot clock costs one life; after three failures, the run ends and the score can be posted to a simple top
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score comes from base points per correct beat, plus speed bonus for finishing early. Perfect possessions build a combo multiplier up to 5x. Correctly converting whistle steal beats grants an instant combo jump and a 'rhy
tips: Keep the rhythm in team chunks: Bulls stomp, Lakers chime.
Watch for the whistle marker; it is the only beat you should intentionally flip.
Use audio as much as color, since later rounds get faster than visual counting.
Protect a high combo by prioritizing accuracy over rushing the last beat.
